data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for filtering by location/resource/time window.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to filter by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this filtering capability has been implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for such filtering but lacks concrete evidence to confirm its existence, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to filter by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
